title: Subitems in work forms
excerpt: We would love to be able to enter in subitems from Work Forms. Being able to find the item name in a drop down, then allowing all the subitem fields to be populated via form. We have had to use a third party paid integra…

posts.author: caloah (Shannon Fry)
posts.cookedHtml: We would love to be able to enter in subitems from Work Forms. Being able to find the item name in a drop down, then allowing all the subitem fields to be populated via form. We have had to use a third party paid integration just to allow our product team to make creative requests. Features are our top level items and User Stories are subitems.
